python.recommendation: Strengthen Python programming and backend development skills.

c.recommendation: Brush up on C pointer management, assembly logic, and embedded structures.

javascript.recommendation: Develop strong Javascript core concepts, async models, and browser execution paths.

pytorch.recommendation: Complete PyTorch modeling tracks and practice building convolutional/recurrent networks.
